problem id: 8d90150c
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(3) XOR SHR(7)

examples:
  10010000 -> 10000001
  00000110 -> 00110000
  00001010 -> 01010000
  10100111 -> 00111001
  10111110 -> 11110001
  01001010 -> 01010000
  10100010 -> 00010001
  00101000 -> 01000000

query: 00110101
predicted answer: 10101000
